build.buildCommand: echo '=== DOSSIER DE TRAVAIL ===' && pwd && echo '=== CONTENU ===' && ls -la && echo '=== package.json present ? ===' && (test -f package.json && echo OUI || echo NON) && echo '=== node/npm dispos ? ===' && (command -v node || echo pas-de-node) && (command -v npm || echo pas-de-npm) && echo '=== FIN DIAGNOSTIC ==='
